Designed with stunning visuals and smooth animations, it helps designers, marketing teams, and motion studios capture leads and build trust instantly.
p: A high-volume, high-energy launch built on scroll-stopping hooks and Gen Z humor to boost visibility before the app even explained itself.

Melo wanted to enter the entertainment market with a bang — not through explanation, but through experience. Instead of educating users about features, we decided to make the brand feel like a friend: loud, funny, chaotic, and impossible to ignore.

We embraced the essence of Gen Z humor — randomness, extreme relatability, unexpected punchlines, and exaggerated reactions. Every piece of content was designed with one purpose: make the viewer laugh within 1 second. If not laugh, then at least stop scrolling.

p: A striking fitness campaign crafted to energize social feeds and motivate users through dynamic visuals, high-tempo edits, and community-driven challenges.

Wave Fitness had a clear vision: motivate people not through perfection, but through energy. Instead of creating polished, intimidating gym ads, we wanted to celebrate movement in all its forms — messy reps, sweaty faces, and triumphant “I did it” moments.

/works/wear-the-energy.title: Wear the Energy - My Framer Site

p: A movement-driven streetwear story using dynamic transitions, bold styling, and LA-inspired locations to make every outfit feel alive.

Velo wanted their new streetwear collection to feel kinetic — like it was created for movement, not mannequins. Our goal was to make viewers feel the outfits before they even saw them in person. That meant embracing motion as the core storytelling element.

We scouted locations that embodied youth culture: sun-soaked rooftops, graffiti-filled alleys, skateparks with chipped concrete, and dimly lit night streets buzzing with neon. Each location brought a new layer of identity to the clothing.

/works/taste-that-pops-on-camera.title: Taste  - My Framer Site
/works/taste-that-pops-on-camera.description: LYNCK Studio is a premium portfolio template built for marketing agencies that want to stand out. Designed with stunning visuals and smooth animations, it helps designers, marketing teams, and motion studios capture leads and build trust instantly.
p: A lively, colourful series built to make every sip look explosive, refreshing, and impossible to scroll past on any social platform.

FizzUp wasn’t afraid to be loud — and neither were we. From day one, we knew this campaign had to be as explosive as the drink itself. We leaned into maximalism: vibrant colours, playful chaos, and sensory overload in the best possible way.

The campaign revolved around capturing the feeling of fizz: the sudden burst, the refreshing hit, the surprising tang. We filmed extreme close-ups of bubbles bursting, liquids swirling, and droplets flying through the air in slow motion. The shots were almost hypnotic — visually satisfying and impossible to scroll past.

/works/caffeine-made-shareable.title: Caffeine Made Shareable - My Framer Site
/works/caffeine-made-shareable.description: LYNCK Studio is a premium portfolio template built for marketing agencies that want to stand out. Designed with stunning visuals and smooth animations, it helps designers, marketing teams, and motion studios capture leads and build trust instantly.
p: A playful, comedic content series that transformed everyday caffeine habits into viral-ready short stories relatable to every coffee lover.

For Nood Coffee, we saw an opportunity to turn caffeine culture into a storytelling playground. Coffee isn’t just a drink — it’s a mood, a ritual, and in many ways, a personality. And if there’s one thing Gen Z loves, it’s content that reflects their small daily struggles and joys.

We started by mapping out key emotional moments in a coffee drinker’s day: the chaotic morning rush, the desperate midday slump, the silly excuses to make a second cup, the dramatic “don’t talk to me until I’ve had coffee” energy. From those insights, we crafted short stories that exaggerated each moment just enough to be funny — but still relatable.

p: A vibrant, fast-paced short-form campaign that turned a simple sparkling drink into a summer trend shared across countless feeds.

Spark Drinks approached us with a vision: they didn’t just want Gen Z to drink their product — they wanted them to live it. The brand already carried a youthful, energetic personality, but their content lacked that “scroll-stopper feel” needed to cut through today’s fast-moving feeds. Our challenge was to translate the refreshing, fizzy feeling of Spark into something visual, emotional, and undeniably shareable.

p: A high-energy social campaign designed to reposition eco-friendly transportation as bold, fun, youthful, and instantly eye-catching on every scroll.

Bolt Mobility wanted one thing: to make eco-friendly transportation feel cool. Not responsible, not practical — cool. Their biggest obstacle wasn’t competitors, but perception. Young riders saw electric mobility as functional but boring. So we set out to build a campaign that would rebrand Bolt as the city’s new cultural symbol.

p: A clean-girl aesthetic campaign that turned everyday skincare routines into relatable, shareable moments loved by beauty-focused Gen Z audiences.

Lumi Skincare had a mission we loved instantly: they wanted to make “real skin” the hero. No over-editing, no heavy filters, no unrealistic textures — just natural beauty captured in effortless moments. Their brand tone aligned perfectly with the rising “soft life” and “clean girl aesthetic” trends dominating social platforms. Our aim was to elevate that aesthetic while keeping every piece grounded in authenticity.

p: We’re a team of mischief-makers and strategy nerds based in LA. Our mission? To make brands unforgettable. We blend data, design, and a healthy dose of playfulness to craft campaigns that captivate, delight, and connect.
We push beyond the mold to create moments worth sharing.
Your brand has a voice. We make sure it’s real, relatable, and irresistible.
We don’t chase trends we predict, measure, and amplify what matters.
Social media moves at the speed of light. We adapt in real time.

LYNCK Studio started as a small crew of social media lovers who wanted to prove that marketing doesn’t have to be boring. From day one, our goal has been simple: turn brands into storytellers people actually want to listen to. We’ve grown from LA’s creative streets to a team with global ambition, blending humor, heart, and a bit of mischief into every campaign we touch.
